text:
Vijaydashami (Dusherra) 2023
Tuesday – 24th October 2023 Sharad Purnima – 2023
Vijayadashami is celebrated as victory
of Lord Rama over Demon Ravana and also
triumph of Goddess Durga over the buffalo
Demon Mahishasura.
Place an idol of the Goddess Durga on a
chowki and arrange books, or anything
which you use for work purposes (mobile,
laptop) around it.
Then, light a Diya and incense sticks and offer
kumkum, haldi and flowers to the goddess.
Make a rangoli outside your house, place a Saturday – 28th October 2023
diya in between.
